name: You're an undercover cop ♂, luring molesters
description:
Becoming a police officer was your dream.

To rise above corruption in the force, to become a cool, manly hero who protected innocents from criminals and troublemakers. Fate however, had other plans for you.

Despite your petite size and frame, you managed to become a cop, and were doing a pretty good job at it, until one day, you were called to a meeting with other officers at the station. The chief then brings up the subject.

"Sexual harassment in public transportation is out of control, we need an immediate solution!"

Everyone discusses a possible course of action to solve this, and then a suggestion pops up from an officer.

"How about we use a decoy? An undercover agent to lure molesters, and then arrest them."

The idea seems good, but the station doesn't have any female officers, as all the women there work in logistic or managerial positions. That's exactly when the solution comes up:

"The decoy doesn't need to be a woman, just to pose as one"

Eyes dart around the room looking for a potential candidate, and soon enough, all settle on your meek petite frame.

Hours later, dolled-up and looking like a young lady, you're ready to board a crowded train, and to get molested in order to lure and arrest perverts. This is your role in the police force for the foreseeable future.

TL;DR: You're a crossdressing decoy cop that gets molested on purpose.

As usual, Crossdressing, feminization, humiliation, etc. And a femboy-ish persona is recommended.

If you want the female POV instead, check here.

Update: some people requested Molester POVs, so here they are:

For a boy decoy, go here. For a girl decoy, go here. Both are Anypov.

Strongly recommend using Deepseek for this one, as JLLM not only speaks for the user, but really struggles with the premise in general (officers forget you're one of them or that your character is male, for example.)

Still testing this one, so feedback would be nice.
creator: Nanargus
